name: pi-model-staging
description_en: A pi extension that adds plan-then-implement mode with a single model ladder. Steps the model and thinking level down as the LLM grinds autonomously, snaps back to the snappy tier when control returns to the user.
description_zh: 一个 pi 扩展，添加了计划然后执行模式，使用单一模型阶梯。随着 LLM 自主运行，逐步降低模型和思考级别，当控制权返回给用户时，快速回弹到快速层级
